pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Managed Kubernetes Cluster implements IAM roles with least-privilege policies, network isolation via VPC and security groups. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Multi-AZ deployment ensures resilience against availability zone failures.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Non-production configuration uses smaller instance sizes and reduced redundancy to minimize costs.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: Configurable instance types and resource parameters allow tuning Managed Kubernetes Cluster for specific workload characteristics.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Consistent resource tagging supports cost allocation and operational visibility. Pulumi state management tracks all infrastructure changes with full audit trail.
